notes:
# Steady 2.20.0

## League shop + AdMob
- **Watch ad for shop points** in Steady League (parent must enable)
- Parent controls: on/off, points per ad (3/5/8), daily ad cap (20–80)
- Shop prices rebalanced so ads are the grind (e.g. 10 min Fun = 50 pts ≈ 10 ads)
- Clean-day bonus capped low so it doesn’t skip the ad grind
- Child-directed AdMob config for younger age bands (G-rated max content)
- DNS VPN allowlists Google Ads / AdMob hosts so rewarded ads load through Steady filter

## Setup for revenue
- Add `keys/admob.json` with your AdMob App ID + Rewarded unit ID (until then, Google test ads)

## Website
- Dashboard toggles for League ads
- League + privacy pages updated
